title: iberis ciliata var. balansae
intro: Iberis ciliata var. balansae, also known as the rock candytuft, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the cress family and is native to the Himalayas. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Iberis ciliata var. balansae include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat coughs, colds, and other respiratory conditions.
